mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRICE_ALERT (USER_ID, ITEM_ID, TICKER, STOCK_NAME, TARGET_PRICE, ALERT_TYPE, IS_TRIGGERED, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{userId}, #{itemId}, #{ticker}, #{stockName}, #{targetPrice}, #{alertType}, 'N', NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT ALERT_ID, USER_ID, ITEM_ID, TICKER, STOCK_NAME, TARGET_PRICE, ALERT_TYPE, IS_TRIGGERED, CREATED_AT, TRIGGERED_AT FROM PRICE_ALERT WHERE USER_ID = #{param1} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT ALERT_ID, USER_ID, ITEM_ID, TICKER, STOCK_NAME, TARGET_PRICE, ALERT_TYPE, IS_TRIGGERED, CREATED_AT FROM PRICE_ALERT WHERE IS_TRIGGERED = 'N'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM PRICE_ALERT WHERE ALERT_ID = #{alertId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
